text_id: Para Pihak sepakat untuk menjaga kerahasiaan seluruh Informasi Rahasia yang diterima dari Pihak lainnya. Informasi Rahasia mencakup namun tidak terbatas pada data keuangan, rencana bisnis, informasi teknis, data pelanggan, dan informasi lain yang ditandai sebagai rahasia atau yang secara wajar dapat dianggap bersifat rahasia.
text_en: The Parties agree to maintain the confidentiality of all Confidential Information received from the other Party. Confidential Information includes but is not limited to financial data, business plans, technical information, customer data, and other information marked as confidential or reasonably considered confidential in nature.
risk_notes: Verify definition of Confidential Information is comprehensive. Check for carve-outs (publicly available info, independently developed).

text_id: Perjanjian ini berlaku selama {{duration}} sejak tanggal penandatanganan. Kewajiban kerahasiaan akan tetap berlaku selama {{confidentiality_period}} setelah berakhirnya Perjanjian ini.
text_en: This Agreement shall be effective for {{duration}} from the date of execution. The confidentiality obligations shall survive for {{confidentiality_period}} after the termination of this Agreement.
risk_notes: Ensure survival period is adequate (typically 2-5 years). Shorter periods favor the disclosing party.

text_id: Dalam hal terjadi pelanggaran atas ketentuan kerahasiaan, Pihak yang melanggar wajib membayar ganti rugi kepada Pihak lainnya sebesar kerugian yang diderita, termasuk namun tidak terbatas pada kerugian langsung, biaya hukum, dan kerugian atas hilangnya keuntungan yang diharapkan.
text_en: In the event of a breach of the confidentiality obligations, the breaching Party shall compensate the other Party for all damages suffered, including but not limited to direct losses, legal costs, and loss of anticipated profits.
risk_notes: Check if consequential damages are included. Consider adding liquidated damages clause for quantifiable breaches.

text_id: Setelah berakhirnya Perjanjian ini atau atas permintaan Pihak yang mengungkapkan, Pihak penerima wajib mengembalikan atau memusnahkan seluruh Informasi Rahasia dalam bentuk apapun, termasuk salinan elektronik, dalam waktu {{return_days}} hari kalender.
text_en: Upon termination of this Agreement or at the request of the Disclosing Party, the Receiving Party shall return or destroy all Confidential Information in any form, including electronic copies, within {{return_days}} calendar days.
risk_notes: Verify destruction certification requirement. Consider exception for legally required retention.

text_id: Selama jangka waktu Perjanjian dan {{non_solicit_period}} setelahnya, masing-masing Pihak tidak akan secara langsung maupun tidak langsung mengajak, merekrut, atau mempekerjakan karyawan Pihak lainnya tanpa persetujuan tertulis terlebih dahulu.
text_en: During the term of this Agreement and for {{non_solicit_period}} thereafter, each Party shall not directly or indirectly solicit, recruit, or employ any employee of the other Party without prior written consent.
risk_notes: Non-solicitation clauses must comply with Indonesian labor law (UU 13/2003). Duration should be reasonable.

text_id: Para Pihak mengakui bahwa pelanggaran atas kewajiban kerahasiaan dapat menimbulkan kerugian yang tidak dapat diperbaiki. Oleh karena itu, Pihak yang dirugikan berhak untuk mengajukan upaya hukum sementara (injunctive relief) di samping upaya hukum lainnya yang tersedia.
text_en: The Parties acknowledge that a breach of confidentiality obligations may cause irreparable harm. Therefore, the aggrieved Party shall be entitled to seek injunctive relief in addition to any other remedies available.
risk_notes: Standard clause. Verify compatibility with chosen dispute resolution mechanism.

text_id: Perjanjian ini diatur oleh dan ditafsirkan berdasarkan hukum Republik Indonesia.
text_en: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Indonesia.
risk_notes: For international NDAs, verify choice of law is appropriate. Indonesian law applies by default for domestic agreements.

text_id: Setiap sengketa yang timbul dari Perjanjian ini akan diselesaikan secara musyawarah untuk mufakat. Apabila tidak tercapai kesepakatan dalam waktu 30 hari, sengketa akan diselesaikan melalui arbitrase di Badan Arbitrase Nasional Indonesia (BANI) di Jakarta.
text_en: Any dispute arising from this Agreement shall be settled by deliberation. If no resolution is reached within 30 days, the dispute shall be resolved through arbitration at the Indonesian National Board of Arbitration (BANI) in Jakarta.
risk_notes: BANI arbitration is standard for Indonesian commercial disputes. Alternative: district court (Pengadilan Negeri).

text_id: Penyedia Jasa setuju untuk menyediakan layanan/barang sebagaimana dirinci dalam Lampiran A Perjanjian ini. Setiap perubahan ruang lingkup harus disepakati secara tertulis oleh kedua belah Pihak melalui amandemen resmi.
text_en: The Service Provider agrees to provide the services/goods as detailed in Appendix A of this Agreement. Any change in scope must be agreed upon in writing by both Parties through a formal amendment.
risk_notes: Ensure Appendix A is detailed and attached. Vague scope leads to disputes.

text_id: Pembayaran akan dilakukan dalam waktu {{payment_days}} hari kalender setelah diterimanya tagihan yang lengkap dan benar. Pembayaran dilakukan melalui transfer bank ke rekening yang ditunjuk oleh Penyedia Jasa. Keterlambatan pembayaran dikenakan denda sebesar {{late_penalty_pct}}% per bulan.
text_en: Payment shall be made within {{payment_days}} calendar days upon receipt of a complete and correct invoice. Payment shall be made via bank transfer to the account designated by the Service Provider. Late payment shall incur a penalty of {{late_penalty_pct}}% per month.
risk_notes: Verify payment terms align with company cash flow cycle. Standard: NET 30. Check late penalty rate (max 2%/month under Indonesian law).

text_id: Penyedia Jasa menjamin bahwa seluruh barang/jasa yang diberikan sesuai dengan spesifikasi yang disepakati, bebas dari cacat material, dan memenuhi standar industri yang berlaku. Masa jaminan berlaku selama {{warranty_months}} bulan sejak tanggal serah terima.
text_en: The Service Provider warrants that all goods/services delivered shall conform to the agreed specifications, be free from material defects, and meet applicable industry standards. The warranty period shall be {{warranty_months}} months from the date of acceptance.
risk_notes: Verify warranty period is adequate for the type of goods/services. Check if warranty covers replacement or repair.

text_id: Masing-masing Pihak dapat mengakhiri Perjanjian ini dengan pemberitahuan tertulis {{notice_days}} hari sebelumnya. Pengakhiran segera dapat dilakukan apabila Pihak lainnya melakukan wanprestasi material dan tidak memperbaikinya dalam waktu 14 hari setelah pemberitahuan tertulis.
text_en: Either Party may terminate this Agreement with {{notice_days}} days prior written notice. Immediate termination may occur if the other Party commits a material breach and fails to cure it within 14 days of written notice.
risk_notes: Check if termination for convenience is included. Verify cure period is reasonable.

text_id: Total tanggung jawab masing-masing Pihak berdasarkan Perjanjian ini tidak akan melebihi nilai total Perjanjian. Tidak ada Pihak yang bertanggung jawab atas kerugian tidak langsung, insidental, atau konsekuensial kecuali dalam hal kelalaian berat atau kesengajaan.
text_en: The total liability of each Party under this Agreement shall not exceed the total value of the Agreement. Neither Party shall be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages except in cases of gross negligence or willful misconduct.
risk_notes: HIGH RISK if liability cap is absent. Verify cap amount is reasonable relative to contract value.

text_id: Penyedia Jasa wajib memberikan ganti rugi dan membebaskan Pemberi Kerja dari segala klaim, kerugian, dan biaya yang timbul dari: (a) pelanggaran hak kekayaan intelektual pihak ketiga; (b) kelalaian atau kesalahan Penyedia Jasa; (c) pelanggaran peraturan perundang-undangan.
text_en: The Service Provider shall indemnify and hold harmless the Client from all claims, losses, and costs arising from: (a) infringement of third-party intellectual property rights; (b) negligence or fault of the Service Provider; (c) violation of applicable laws and regulations.
risk_notes: Ensure indemnification is mutual or appropriately one-sided. Check if IP indemnification covers all deliverables.

text_id: Pemberi Kerja berhak untuk melakukan audit atas catatan dan dokumen Penyedia Jasa yang terkait dengan pelaksanaan Perjanjian ini, dengan pemberitahuan tertulis {{audit_notice_days}} hari sebelumnya. Audit dapat dilakukan oleh pihak ketiga yang ditunjuk.
text_en: The Client shall have the right to audit the Service Provider's records and documents related to the performance of this Agreement, with {{audit_notice_days}} days prior written notice. Audits may be conducted by a designated third party.
risk_notes: Important for compliance monitoring. Verify audit frequency and cost allocation.

text_id: Penyedia Jasa wajib menjaga kerahasiaan seluruh informasi yang diperoleh dalam pelaksanaan Perjanjian ini. Kewajiban kerahasiaan berlaku selama jangka waktu Perjanjian dan {{confidentiality_survival}} setelah berakhirnya Perjanjian.
text_en: The Service Provider shall maintain the confidentiality of all information obtained during the performance of this Agreement. The confidentiality obligation shall remain in effect during the term of the Agreement and {{confidentiality_survival}} after its termination.
risk_notes: Standard confidentiality clause for vendor agreements. Verify survival period.

text_id: Tidak ada Pihak yang bertanggung jawab atas keterlambatan atau kegagalan pelaksanaan kewajiban yang disebabkan oleh keadaan kahar, termasuk namun tidak terbatas pada bencana alam, perang, epidemi, kebijakan pemerintah, atau gangguan infrastruktur yang berada di luar kendali wajar Para Pihak. Pihak yang terdampak wajib memberitahukan Pihak lainnya dalam waktu 7 hari.
text_en: Neither Party shall be liable for delay or failure to perform obligations caused by force majeure events, including but not limited to natural disasters, war, epidemics, government actions, or infrastructure disruptions beyond the reasonable control of the Parties. The affected Party must notify the other Party within 7 days.
risk_notes: Verify force majeure definition is comprehensive. Check notification period and termination rights if force majeure exceeds a specified duration.

text_id: Perjanjian ini tunduk pada hukum Republik Indonesia. Segala sengketa yang tidak dapat diselesaikan secara musyawarah akan diselesaikan melalui Pengadilan Negeri Jakarta Pusat.
text_en: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the Republic of Indonesia. Any dispute that cannot be resolved amicably shall be settled through the Central Jakarta District Court.
risk_notes: Standard for domestic vendor agreements. For higher-value contracts, consider BANI arbitration instead.

text_id: Harga pembelian untuk barang/aset sebagaimana tercantum dalam Perjanjian ini adalah sebesar {{total_value}} ({{currency}}), belum termasuk Pajak Pertambahan Nilai (PPN) sebesar 11% yang menjadi tanggung jawab Pembeli.
text_en: The purchase price for the goods/assets as stated in this Agreement is {{total_value}} ({{currency}}), exclusive of 11% Value Added Tax (VAT) which shall be borne by the Buyer.
risk_notes: Verify VAT rate (currently 11% in Indonesia per UU HPP 2021). Clarify which party bears other taxes (PPh, BPHTB for property).

text_id: Penyerahan barang/aset akan dilakukan di {{delivery_location}} selambat-lambatnya {{delivery_days}} hari kalender sejak pembayaran diterima. Risiko berpindah kepada Pembeli pada saat penyerahan dan penandatanganan Berita Acara Serah Terima.
text_en: Delivery of goods/assets shall take place at {{delivery_location}} no later than {{delivery_days}} calendar days from receipt of payment. Risk transfers to the Buyer upon delivery and execution of the Handover Certificate.
risk_notes: Clarify Incoterms if applicable. Verify risk transfer point and insurance requirements.

text_id: Pembeli berhak melakukan pemeriksaan atas barang/aset dalam waktu {{inspection_days}} hari setelah penyerahan. Apabila ditemukan cacat atau ketidaksesuaian, Pembeli wajib memberitahukan Penjual secara tertulis dan Penjual wajib melakukan perbaikan atau penggantian dalam waktu 14 hari.
text_en: The Buyer shall have the right to inspect the goods/assets within {{inspection_days}} days after delivery. If defects or non-conformities are found, the Buyer must notify the Seller in writing, and the Seller shall remedy or replace within 14 days.
risk_notes: Verify inspection period is sufficient. Check if rejection right is included for material defects.

text_id: Penjual menjamin bahwa barang/aset yang dijual: (a) sesuai dengan spesifikasi; (b) bebas dari cacat tersembunyi; (c) bebas dari sengketa hak milik dan jaminan pihak ketiga; (d) memenuhi standar keselamatan dan regulasi yang berlaku.
text_en: The Seller warrants that the goods/assets sold: (a) conform to specifications; (b) are free from latent defects; (c) are free from ownership disputes and third-party encumbrances; (d) comply with applicable safety standards and regulations.
risk_notes: Title warranty is critical for property transactions. Verify clean title documentation.

text_id: Hak milik atas barang/aset akan berpindah kepada Pembeli pada saat seluruh pembayaran telah diterima dan Berita Acara Serah Terima telah ditandatangani oleh kedua belah Pihak. Penjual wajib menyerahkan seluruh dokumen kepemilikan asli.
text_en: Title to the goods/assets shall transfer to the Buyer upon receipt of full payment and execution of the Handover Certificate by both Parties. The Seller shall deliver all original ownership documents.
risk_notes: For property: verify notarized deed (Akta Jual Beli) and BPN registration requirements.

text_id: Tidak ada Pihak yang bertanggung jawab atas keterlambatan penyerahan atau pembayaran yang disebabkan oleh keadaan kahar. Pihak yang terdampak wajib memberitahukan Pihak lainnya dalam waktu 7 hari dan melakukan upaya wajar untuk meminimalisir dampak.
text_en: Neither Party shall be liable for delays in delivery or payment caused by force majeure events. The affected Party must notify the other Party within 7 days and make reasonable efforts to mitigate the impact.
risk_notes: Standard force majeure clause. Verify if extended force majeure triggers termination rights.

text_id: Perjanjian ini tunduk pada hukum Republik Indonesia. Sengketa diselesaikan melalui musyawarah, dan apabila gagal, melalui Pengadilan Negeri Jakarta Pusat.
text_en: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the Republic of Indonesia. Disputes shall be resolved by deliberation, and if unsuccessful, through the Central Jakarta District Court.
risk_notes: Standard governing law clause for domestic sale-purchase agreements.

text_id: Setiap sengketa diselesaikan secara musyawarah. Apabila tidak tercapai kesepakatan dalam 30 hari, sengketa diselesaikan melalui arbitrase BANI di Jakarta atau Pengadilan Negeri yang berwenang.
text_en: Any dispute shall be resolved by deliberation. If no agreement is reached within 30 days, the dispute shall be resolved through BANI arbitration in Jakarta or the competent District Court.
risk_notes: Parties should choose one: arbitration OR court. Having both creates ambiguity.

text_id: Para Pihak sepakat untuk membentuk usaha patungan dengan tujuan {{jv_purpose}}. Ruang lingkup kegiatan usaha meliputi {{business_scope}} sebagaimana diatur dalam Anggaran Dasar Perusahaan Patungan.
text_en: The Parties agree to establish a joint venture for the purpose of {{jv_purpose}}. The scope of business activities shall include {{business_scope}} as set forth in the Articles of Association of the Joint Venture Company.
risk_notes: Purpose clause must align with Articles of Association and Indonesian investment regulations (BKPM).

text_id: Perusahaan Patungan dikelola oleh Direksi yang terdiri dari {{board_size}} anggota. Pihak Pertama berhak menunjuk {{party1_directors}} Direktur dan Pihak Kedua berhak menunjuk {{party2_directors}} Direktur. Komisaris ditunjuk sesuai proporsi kepemilikan saham.
text_en: The Joint Venture Company shall be managed by a Board of Directors consisting of {{board_size}} members. The First Party shall be entitled to appoint {{party1_directors}} Directors and the Second Party shall appoint {{party2_directors}} Directors. Commissioners shall be appointed proportional to shareholding.
risk_notes: Board composition must comply with UUPT (Company Law). Verify deadlock resolution mechanism.

text_id: Modal dasar Perusahaan Patungan adalah sebesar {{authorized_capital}} ({{currency}}). Pihak Pertama menyetorkan {{party1_pct}}% dan Pihak Kedua menyetorkan {{party2_pct}}% dari modal ditempatkan dan disetor. Setoran modal dilakukan dalam waktu {{capital_deadline}} sejak pendirian.
text_en: The authorized capital of the Joint Venture Company shall be {{authorized_capital}} ({{currency}}). The First Party shall contribute {{party1_pct}}% and the Second Party {{party2_pct}}% of the issued and paid-up capital. Capital contributions shall be made within {{capital_deadline}} from incorporation.
risk_notes: Verify minimum capital requirements per Indonesian law. For PMA (foreign investment), check BKPM investment list restrictions.

text_id: Keuntungan bersih Perusahaan Patungan akan dibagikan kepada Para Pihak sesuai proporsi kepemilikan saham, setelah dikurangi cadangan wajib sebesar {{reserve_pct}}% sebagaimana disyaratkan oleh UUPT.
text_en: Net profits of the Joint Venture Company shall be distributed to the Parties in proportion to their shareholding, after deducting the mandatory reserve of {{reserve_pct}}% as required by the Company Law.
risk_notes: UUPT requires minimum 20% reserve until reserve equals 20% of issued capital. Verify dividend distribution policy.

text_id: Manajemen operasional sehari-hari Perusahaan Patungan akan dilaksanakan oleh Direktur Utama yang ditunjuk oleh {{appointing_party}}. Keputusan strategis yang memerlukan persetujuan RUPS meliputi: perubahan Anggaran Dasar, penerbitan saham baru, pinjaman di atas {{loan_threshold}}, dan penjualan aset material.
text_en: Day-to-day operational management of the Joint Venture Company shall be carried out by the President Director appointed by {{appointing_party}}. Strategic decisions requiring General Meeting approval include: amendment of Articles of Association, issuance of new shares, loans exceeding {{loan_threshold}}, and sale of material assets.
risk_notes: List of reserved matters should be comprehensive. Verify quorum requirements for RUPS.

text_id: Masing-masing Pihak dapat keluar dari Perusahaan Patungan dengan ketentuan: (a) hak penolakan pertama (right of first refusal) diberikan kepada Pihak lainnya; (b) penilaian saham dilakukan oleh penilai independen; (c) pemberitahuan tertulis {{exit_notice_days}} hari sebelumnya.
text_en: Either Party may exit the Joint Venture Company subject to: (a) right of first refusal granted to the other Party; (b) share valuation by an independent appraiser; (c) {{exit_notice_days}} days prior written notice.
risk_notes: Exit mechanism is critical for JV agreements. Verify drag-along and tag-along rights if needed.

text_id: Hak kekayaan intelektual yang dikembangkan dalam pelaksanaan usaha patungan menjadi milik Perusahaan Patungan. HKI yang dibawa oleh masing-masing Pihak tetap menjadi milik Pihak tersebut, dengan lisensi non-eksklusif diberikan kepada Perusahaan Patungan.
text_en: Intellectual property developed in the course of the joint venture shall belong to the Joint Venture Company. IP contributed by each Party shall remain the property of that Party, with a non-exclusive license granted to the Joint Venture Company.
risk_notes: IP ownership is a common source of JV disputes. Clarify background IP vs. foreground IP.

text_id: Para Pihak dan Perusahaan Patungan wajib menjaga kerahasiaan seluruh informasi bisnis, teknis, dan keuangan yang diperoleh dalam rangka usaha patungan. Kewajiban ini berlaku selama {{confidentiality_period}} setelah berakhirnya Perjanjian.
text_en: The Parties and the Joint Venture Company shall maintain the confidentiality of all business, technical, and financial information obtained in connection with the joint venture. This obligation shall survive for {{confidentiality_period}} after termination of this Agreement.
risk_notes: Standard confidentiality clause for JV. Verify scope includes both parties and JV entity.

text_id: Sengketa antar Pihak diselesaikan melalui: (a) musyawarah selama 30 hari; (b) mediasi melalui mediator yang disepakati bersama selama 30 hari; (c) arbitrase melalui BANI di Jakarta. Keputusan arbitrase bersifat final dan mengikat.
text_en: Disputes between Parties shall be resolved through: (a) deliberation for 30 days; (b) mediation through a mutually agreed mediator for 30 days; (c) arbitration through BANI in Jakarta. The arbitration award shall be final and binding.
risk_notes: Multi-tier dispute resolution is recommended for JVs. BANI arbitration is standard for high-value agreements.

text_id: Perusahaan Patungan dapat dibubarkan berdasarkan: (a) kesepakatan seluruh pemegang saham; (b) putusan pengadilan; (c) berakhirnya jangka waktu pendirian. Likuidasi dilakukan sesuai ketentuan UUPT dengan penunjukan likuidator yang disepakati bersama.
text_en: The Joint Venture Company may be dissolved based on: (a) unanimous shareholder agreement; (b) court order; (c) expiration of the incorporation period. Liquidation shall be conducted in accordance with the Company Law with appointment of a mutually agreed liquidator.
risk_notes: Dissolution procedures must comply with UUPT. Verify asset distribution order and creditor notification requirements.

text_id: Pemilik setuju untuk menyewakan tanah dan/atau bangunan yang terletak di {{premises_address}}, dengan luas {{premises_area}} m2, sebagaimana tercantum dalam Sertifikat Hak {{land_right_type}} No. {{certificate_number}}.
text_en: The Owner agrees to lease the land and/or building located at {{premises_address}}, with an area of {{premises_area}} sqm, as stated in the {{land_right_type}} Certificate No. {{certificate_number}}.
risk_notes: Verify land certificate (SHM/SHGB/SHP) is valid and not under dispute. Check building permit (IMB/PBG) status.

text_id: Biaya sewa sebesar {{rent_amount}} ({{currency}}) per {{rent_period}}, dibayarkan di muka setiap {{payment_frequency}}. Biaya sewa dapat ditinjau setiap {{review_period}} dengan kenaikan maksimal {{max_increase_pct}}% per tahun.
text_en: The rent shall be {{rent_amount}} ({{currency}}) per {{rent_period}}, payable in advance every {{payment_frequency}}. Rent may be reviewed every {{review_period}} with a maximum increase of {{max_increase_pct}}% per annum.
risk_notes: Verify rent escalation cap is reasonable. Check if rent includes service charges, PBB, and utilities.

text_id: Jangka waktu sewa adalah selama {{lease_duration}} terhitung sejak {{effective_date}}. Perpanjangan sewa harus diajukan secara tertulis selambat-lambatnya {{renewal_notice_months}} bulan sebelum berakhirnya jangka waktu sewa.
text_en: The lease term shall be {{lease_duration}} commencing from {{effective_date}}. Renewal must be requested in writing no later than {{renewal_notice_months}} months before the expiry of the lease term.
risk_notes: Verify lease duration aligns with underlying land right period (SHGB typically 30 years). Check early termination options.

text_id: Penyewa bertanggung jawab atas pemeliharaan sehari-hari dan perbaikan ringan. Pemilik bertanggung jawab atas perbaikan struktural dan penggantian komponen utama bangunan. Biaya pemeliharaan ditanggung sesuai pembagian tanggung jawab ini.
text_en: The Tenant shall be responsible for day-to-day maintenance and minor repairs. The Owner shall be responsible for structural repairs and replacement of major building components. Maintenance costs shall be borne according to this allocation.
risk_notes: Clearly define what constitutes 'minor' vs 'structural' repairs to avoid disputes.

text_id: Penyewa dapat melakukan renovasi atau perubahan atas objek sewa dengan persetujuan tertulis dari Pemilik. Seluruh perbaikan permanen menjadi milik Pemilik pada saat berakhirnya sewa, kecuali disepakati lain.
text_en: The Tenant may make improvements or alterations to the leased premises with the Owner's prior written consent. All permanent improvements shall become the property of the Owner upon lease termination, unless otherwise agreed.
risk_notes: Verify compensation mechanism for tenant improvements at lease end. Document all approved alterations.

text_id: Penyewa memiliki hak opsi untuk memperpanjang sewa dengan ketentuan: (a) tidak ada tunggakan; (b) tidak ada pelanggaran material; (c) pemberitahuan tertulis {{renewal_notice_months}} bulan sebelumnya. Ketentuan perpanjangan, termasuk biaya sewa, akan dinegosiasikan ulang.
text_en: The Tenant shall have the option to renew the lease subject to: (a) no arrears; (b) no material breach; (c) {{renewal_notice_months}} months prior written notice. Renewal terms, including rent, shall be renegotiated.
risk_notes: Verify renewal is an option, not automatic. Check if first right of refusal applies.

text_id: Perjanjian ini dapat diakhiri sebelum waktunya apabila: (a) Penyewa menunggak pembayaran selama {{arrears_months}} bulan berturut-turut; (b) Penyewa melanggar ketentuan penggunaan; (c) objek sewa rusak total akibat keadaan kahar; (d) kesepakatan bersama secara tertulis.
text_en: This Agreement may be terminated early if: (a) the Tenant is in arrears for {{arrears_months}} consecutive months; (b) the Tenant violates usage provisions; (c) the premises are totally destroyed by force majeure; (d) mutual written agreement.
risk_notes: Verify early termination penalty or deposit forfeiture terms. Check eviction procedures under Indonesian law.

text_id: Perjanjian ini tunduk pada hukum Republik Indonesia, khususnya Kitab Undang-Undang Hukum Perdata dan peraturan pertanahan yang berlaku.
text_en: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the Republic of Indonesia, particularly the Civil Code and applicable land regulations.
risk_notes: Land lease agreements are subject to specific Indonesian land law (UUPA, PP 18/2021).

text_id: Karyawan dipekerjakan dalam jabatan {{position}} dan bertanggung jawab untuk melaksanakan tugas sebagaimana dirinci dalam uraian jabatan (Lampiran A). Karyawan melapor langsung kepada {{reporting_to}}.
text_en: The Employee is employed in the position of {{position}} and shall be responsible for performing duties as detailed in the job description (Appendix A). The Employee reports directly to {{reporting_to}}.
risk_notes: Ensure job description is attached and comprehensive. Vague duties may limit employer's ability to assign tasks.

text_id: Perusahaan akan membayar gaji pokok sebesar {{base_salary}} ({{currency}}) per bulan, dibayarkan pada tanggal {{payday}} setiap bulan. Gaji sudah termasuk komponen tetap yang diwajibkan peraturan ketenagakerjaan.
text_en: The Company shall pay a base salary of {{base_salary}} ({{currency}}) per month, payable on the {{payday}}th of each month. The salary includes fixed components required by labor regulations.
risk_notes: Verify salary meets UMR/UMK (regional minimum wage). Check compliance with PPh 21 withholding.

text_id: Karyawan berhak atas: (a) BPJS Kesehatan dan Ketenagakerjaan sesuai peraturan; (b) cuti tahunan {{annual_leave}} hari kerja; (c) THR (Tunjangan Hari Raya) sebesar 1 bulan gaji; (d) tunjangan lain sesuai kebijakan Perusahaan.
text_en: The Employee shall be entitled to: (a) BPJS Health and Employment insurance as required by regulation; (b) {{annual_leave}} working days annual leave; (c) THR (Religious Holiday Allowance) equal to 1 month salary; (d) other allowances per Company policy.
risk_notes: BPJS and THR are mandatory under Indonesian law. Verify annual leave (minimum 12 days per UU 13/2003).

text_id: Hubungan kerja dapat diakhiri dengan: (a) pengunduran diri dengan pemberitahuan {{notice_days}} hari; (b) PHK oleh Perusahaan sesuai ketentuan UU Cipta Kerja dan PP 35/2021; (c) berakhirnya PKWT; (d) pensiun. Pesangon dan uang penghargaan masa kerja dibayarkan sesuai peraturan yang berlaku.
text_en: Employment may be terminated by: (a) resignation with {{notice_days}} days notice; (b) dismissal by the Company in accordance with the Job Creation Law and GR 35/2021; (c) expiration of fixed-term contract; (d) retirement. Severance pay and service appreciation shall be paid in accordance with applicable regulations.
risk_notes: Employment termination in Indonesia is heavily regulated. Verify compliance with UU Cipta Kerja and PP 35/2021 severance calculations.

text_id: Selama {{non_compete_period}} setelah berakhirnya hubungan kerja, Karyawan tidak akan bekerja pada atau mendirikan usaha yang bersaing langsung dengan bisnis Perusahaan di wilayah {{non_compete_area}}. Perusahaan akan memberikan kompensasi yang wajar selama periode ini.
text_en: For {{non_compete_period}} after termination of employment, the Employee shall not work for or establish a business directly competing with the Company's business in {{non_compete_area}}. The Company shall provide reasonable compensation during this period.
risk_notes: Non-compete clauses have limited enforceability in Indonesia. Must include compensation and be reasonable in scope/duration.

text_id: Karyawan wajib menjaga kerahasiaan seluruh informasi Perusahaan yang diperoleh selama masa kerja. Kewajiban ini berlaku selama hubungan kerja dan {{confidentiality_period}} setelah berakhirnya hubungan kerja.
text_en: The Employee shall maintain the confidentiality of all Company information obtained during employment. This obligation shall remain in effect during employment and for {{confidentiality_period}} after termination.
risk_notes: Standard employment confidentiality clause. Verify scope and survival period.

text_id: Seluruh karya intelektual yang diciptakan oleh Karyawan dalam rangka pelaksanaan tugas dan menggunakan sumber daya Perusahaan menjadi milik Perusahaan. Karyawan setuju untuk menandatangani dokumen pengalihan HKI yang diperlukan.
text_en: All intellectual works created by the Employee in the course of employment using Company resources shall be the property of the Company. The Employee agrees to execute any IP assignment documents as required.
risk_notes: IP assignment clause is standard for knowledge workers. Verify compliance with Indonesian IP law (UU Paten, UU Hak Cipta).

text_id: Perjanjian ini tunduk pada hukum ketenagakerjaan Republik Indonesia, khususnya UU No. 13 Tahun 2003 tentang Ketenagakerjaan sebagaimana diubah oleh UU No. 6 Tahun 2023 tentang Cipta Kerja.
text_en: This Agreement shall be governed by the labor laws of the Republic of Indonesia, particularly Law No. 13 of 2003 on Manpower as amended by Law No. 6 of 2023 on Job Creation.
risk_notes: Employment agreements must comply with the latest labor regulations including UU Cipta Kerja amendments.

text_id: Rapat Direksi/Dewan Komisaris sah apabila dihadiri oleh sekurang-kurangnya {{quorum_pct}}% dari jumlah anggota. Ketua Rapat adalah Direktur Utama/Presiden Komisaris atau anggota yang ditunjuk.
text_en: A Board of Directors/Commissioners meeting is valid if attended by at least {{quorum_pct}}% of the members. The Meeting Chair shall be the President Director/President Commissioner or a designated member.
risk_notes: Quorum requirements must comply with UUPT and Articles of Association. Standard minimum is 50%+1.

text_id: Keputusan diambil berdasarkan musyawarah untuk mufakat. Apabila tidak tercapai mufakat, keputusan diambil berdasarkan suara terbanyak sederhana (lebih dari 50%). Setiap anggota memiliki satu suara. Circular resolution diperbolehkan dengan persetujuan tertulis seluruh anggota.
text_en: Decisions shall be made by deliberation to reach consensus. If no consensus is reached, decisions shall be made by simple majority vote (more than 50%). Each member has one vote. Circular resolutions are permitted with written consent of all members.
risk_notes: Verify voting threshold for specific matters (some may require supermajority per Articles of Association).

text_id: Anggota Direksi/Komisaris yang memiliki benturan kepentingan dengan mata acara yang dibahas wajib mengungkapkan benturan kepentingan tersebut dan tidak berhak memberikan suara. Kehadiran anggota yang abstain tidak diperhitungkan dalam penentuan kuorum untuk mata acara tersebut.
text_en: A Director/Commissioner who has a conflict of interest with the agenda item under discussion must disclose the conflict and shall not be entitled to vote. The presence of abstaining members shall not be counted for quorum purposes for that agenda item.
risk_notes: Conflict of interest disclosure is mandatory under UUPT. Failure to disclose may expose directors to personal liability.

text_id: Risalah rapat wajib dibuat untuk setiap rapat, memuat: (a) tanggal, waktu, dan tempat; (b) daftar hadir; (c) mata acara; (d) pembahasan dan pendapat; (e) keputusan yang diambil; (f) dissenting opinion jika ada. Risalah ditandatangani oleh Ketua Rapat dan seluruh anggota yang hadir.
text_en: Minutes shall be prepared for every meeting, containing: (a) date, time, and venue; (b) attendance list; (c) agenda; (d) discussions and opinions; (e) decisions taken; (f) dissenting opinions if any. Minutes shall be signed by the Meeting Chair and all members present.
risk_notes: Minutes are legal documents under UUPT. Ensure all required elements are captured. Consider notarization for material decisions.

text_id: Perubahan atas SOP ini hanya dapat dilakukan melalui keputusan Rapat Direksi/Dewan Komisaris dengan kuorum dan suara yang sama dengan ketentuan pengambilan keputusan. Perubahan berlaku efektif sejak tanggal penandatanganan risalah rapat yang menyetujui perubahan tersebut.
text_en: Amendments to this SOP may only be made through a Board of Directors/Commissioners meeting resolution with the same quorum and voting requirements. Amendments take effect from the date of signing of the meeting minutes approving the amendment.
risk_notes: Ensure amendment procedures are consistent with the company's Articles of Association.

text_id: SOP ini disusun berdasarkan: (a) UU No. 40 Tahun 2007 tentang Perseroan Terbatas; (b) Anggaran Dasar Perusahaan; (c) Peraturan OJK yang berlaku bagi perusahaan terbuka; (d) Pedoman Tata Kelola Perusahaan yang Baik (GCG).
text_en: This SOP is based on: (a) Law No. 40 of 2007 on Limited Liability Companies; (b) the Company's Articles of Association; (c) applicable OJK Regulations for public companies; (d) Good Corporate Governance (GCG) Guidelines.
risk_notes: For publicly listed companies (like PJAA/IDX), OJK regulations add additional disclosure and governance requirements.
